column1: CP violation is linked to neutrino oscillations and could influence handedness.
A hidden CP-violating phase may exist in neutrino interactions.
CP violation in weak force interactions contributes to matter-antimatter asymmetry.
Alternative CP violation conditions could lead to observable right-handed neutrinos.
The Majorana hypothesis connects CP violation to neutrino-antineutrino transitions.
CP violation might have a geometric component that interacts with cosmic expansion/contraction.
Neutrino entanglement could play a role in CP violation effects.
